# DoorStep Diva — LLM Site Information

> DoorStep Diva is a premium at-home beauty services company operating across Delhi NCR, Lucknow, and Ayodhya, India.

## What We Do
We send certified, professional beauty artists to clients' homes. No travel to a salon required.

## Services
- Hair: Cuts, colour, balayage, keratin treatments, Olaplex, blow-dry
- Skin: Waxing, brightening facials, chemical peels, body polish, threading
- Makeup: Party glam, bridal makeup, sangeet, engagement looks
- Eyelash Extensions: Classic, hybrid, volume (2D-6D), cat eye, foxy
- Semi-Permanent Makeup: Microblading, combo brows, lip blush, nano liner
- Nail Extensions: Acrylic, gel/shellac, PolyGel, nail art

## Service Areas
Delhi, Gurgaon, Noida, Faridabad (Delhi NCR), Lucknow, Ayodhya

## Contact
- WhatsApp / Call: +91 7985183449
- Website: https://doorstepdiva.com

## Key Facts
- All artists are certified professionals
- Premium brands: L'Oreal Professionnel, Kerastase, Olaplex, MAC, Charlotte Tilbury
- Bridal packages available with trial sessions
- Lash extensions last 3-5 weeks
- Semi-permanent results last 12 months to 3 years

## Blog
https://doorstepdiva.com/blog
